SDK_NAME.description: Display name for the SDK (e.g., Huefy, FlagKit)

SDK_SLUG.description: Lowercase slug used in package names, file paths, URLs

SDK_SLUG_UPPER.description: Uppercase slug for environment variables and constants

SDK_SLUG_PASCAL.description: PascalCase slug for class names and type names

ORG_NAME.description: npm scope / organization name with @ prefix

ORG_SLUG.description: Organization slug for Go modules, Java packages, Maven groups

ENV_MODE_VAR.description: Environment variable name for SDK mode (local/beta/production)
